title: parent-features

featureResults.parentHome: Today status, seven-day records, teacher feedback, reminders, menus, and storybook entry now use child-scoped D01 store data. Unauthorized children show a real empty/unauthorized state.
featureResults.communication: Parent communication reads and writes D01 messages/conversations. Teacher reply loop remains a D02/C13 dependency.
featureResults.growthRecords: Parent growth archive is a read-only child-scoped D01/D03 record list with detail viewing and real empty states.
featureResults.storybook: Storybooks are loaded and saved by childId in the D01 storybooks bucket; generated results remain after refresh. demoSeed is limited to authorized demo accounts.
featureResults.health: Parent health management now shows readonly morning checks, abnormal records, health materials, and consultation summaries.
featureResults.diet: Parent nutrition view filters menus and diet records by child/class/date and hides teacher-only write controls.
featureResults.reminders: Added parent reminders page with child-scoped read status persisted across refresh.
featureResults.childScope: Removed global parent c-1 silent fallback. Invalid child ids show unauthorized state instead.

openFollowUps: D02/C13 continues to own teacher replies, director aggregation, and AI suggestion send-loop behavior.
When production APIs are available, replace D01 demo persistence while preserving child-scoped permission checks and refresh persistence semantics.
The Playwright webServer on port 3330 was blocked by an existing .next/dev/lock, so validation used the existing dev server at http://127.0.0.1:3000.
